objective:
FICHE_STRATEGIE v1
id: breakout_donchian_adx
archetype: breakout_donchian_adx
family: breakout
timeframe: 1h
side: both
indicators:
- donchian(period=30)
- adx(period=18)
- atr(period=14)
entry:
- long: close > donchian.upper and adx.adx > 35
- short: close < donchian.lower and adx.adx > 35
exit:
- condition: cross_any(close, donchian.middle) or adx.adx < 25
risk:
stop_atr_mult: 2.25
tp_atr_mult: 4.0
description: ATR stop-loss (2.25x) and take-profit (4.0x)
constraints:
- no_lookahead: true
- only_registry_indicators: true

iterations.error: Dataset insuffisant pour Builder: 217 barres (< 300) sur XRPUSDC/1h.
